title: Demon Suit Deira
description:
Stylized Bat Outfit - VRChat / Anime Style

Stylized female outfit designed for anime and VR-style characters, suitable for VRChat avatars and general 3D rendering.

This outfit features a sleek, glossy black bodysuit with a form-fitting silhouette and sharp, wing-inspired seam details on the chest. A heart-shaped semi-transparent mesh panel at the torso adds a cute yet edgy focal point. Oversized bat-wing-style sleeves with a reflective finish give the design a bold gothic and vampiric aesthetic, while a matching choker with a central jewel completes the look.

Perfect for stylized avatars, renders, showcases, and customizable character models.

Character body shown is for preview purposes only and is not included.

Technical Details

6826 vertices

Compatible with the Deira base

Deira base model is not included

No blendshapes included

Optimized for VRChat / Unity / Blender

title: Bunny Strap Set For Deira
description:
Stylized Female Outfit - VRChat / Anime Style

Stylized female outfit designed for anime and VR-style characters, suitable for use in VRChat avatars and general 3D rendering.

The outfit features a fitted bodysuit with soft pastel accents and subtle pattern details. Black contrasting elements include thigh-high stockings, shoulder sleeves, and a minimal lower garment that creates a strong visual contrast. A harness-style strap system wraps around the torso, featuring a metallic buckle at the chest and vertical straps that enhance the silhouette and add a modern, edgy touch.

The overall design emphasizes a sleek, form-fitting shape while maintaining a cute yet slightly provocative aesthetic. Ideal for stylized avatars, renders, showcases, and customizable character models.

Character body shown is for preview purposes only and is not included.

Original Design

Original design by Korura Club

Technical Details

10,975 vertices

3 materials

Prefab included

Compatible with the Deira base

Deira base model is not included

Blendshapes included: Breast size Tiger

title: Kitten Set Cute For Deira
description:
Cute / kawaii style clothing set, designed specifically for the Deira body base.

Includes a short bandeau-style top in black with a cute cat face design on the front, complemented by thin straps that give it a delicate and stylish look. The bottom piece is a simple black underwear-style garment, featuring a decorative paw print on the back and cat ears on the front, maintaining an adorable overall aesthetic.

The mesh is highly optimized, with 2,347 vertices, making it ideal for use in VRChat and other real-time environments. The object includes only the clothing; the body base is not included.

It does not contain blendshapes, allowing for a clean and flexible workflow for adjustments or customization.

Dependencies

Poiyomi toon shader
